products.source_description: Introducing NamoAG , an Indigenously developed AgriDrone Navigation device. Designed with the unique challenges of agriculture elds in mind, NamoAG delivers high-accuracy navigation, multi-constellation satellite support, and seamless pairing with Ag++ Flight Controller. From wide-open farms to complex terrains, y with condence. Key Features:Multi-Constellation Satellite Support: Simultaneous tracking of GPS, GLONASS, Galileo, BeiDou, SBAS, and QZSS for superior signal availability. High Navigation Accuracy: Enhanced positional accuracy with 1.5m – 3m CEP (Circular Error Probable), ideal for precision drone applications. Built-in SAW Filters and LNA (Low Noise Amplifier): Improves signal clarity and reduces interference for noise-resilient performance. Compact and Lightweight Design: Small form factor (61.82 x 61.82 x 19.81mm ~30g) for easy integration into lightweight UAV and drone frames High-Sensitivity Compass with ±8 Gauss Range: Enables precise heading detection and performance stability even in strong magnetic eld environments. DroneCAN Communication Protocol: Offers noise-resistant, interference-free, and real-time data transmission between GPS, compass, ight controllers, and other drone peripherals.

products.source_description: Features	Dual-processor system with 32-bit architecture	Supports obstacle avoidance radars and terrain-following altimeter	8 PWM motor outputs, 2 CAN buses, 3 UART ports	Compatible with any open-source firmware and ground control software. AeroFC V2 is a next-generation, high-performance flight controller engineered to power any drone, any mission, anywhere. Designed and built in India, it brings together precision, reliability, and intelligent control to support everything from agriculture and mapping to logistics, surveillance, inspection, and custom UAV innovations. With full compatibility for any open-source firmware and ground control software. SUPERIOR PROCESSING POWER AeroFC V2 Flight Controller is powered by a high-performance main processor built on a 32-bitarchitecture, running at high speed. It operates alongside an efficient I/O processor tomanage input and output seamlessly. ADVANCED EXTERNAL SENSOR SUPPORT AeroFC V2 Flight Controller supports CAN-based front and back obstacle avoidance radars, allowing your drone to navigate complex environments with ease. Additionally, the CAN-based altimeter provides precise terrain – following capabilities, ensuring stable and accurate flights even in rugged or varied landscapes. 	CAN-Based Front and Back Obstacle Avoidance Radars 	Provides Precise Terrain-Following Capabilities BROADER CONNECTIVITY FOR FLEXIBILITY AeroFC V2 Flight Controller offers 8 PWM outputs for motors, 4 auxiliary PWM/GPIO outputs, and 2 CAN buses, 3 UART ports for complex configurations and seamless connectivity. products.source_description: Key features: Gets fix in seconds:The Reach RS2+ gets a fixed solution in seconds and maintains a robust performance even in challenging conditions. Centimeter accuracy can be achieved on distances over 60 km in RTK and 100 km in PPK mode. The receiver tracks GPS/QZSS (L1C/A, L2C), GLONASS (L1OF, L2OF), BeiDou (B1I, B2I), and Galileo (E1B/C, E5b).Built-in LTE modem:The Reach RS2+ features a power-efficient LTE modem ensuring 4G connectivity while staying backward compatible with 3G and 2G. Corrections can be accessed or broadcasted over NTRIP independently, without relying on an Internet connection on your phone.22 hours on one charge:Up to 22 hours of autonomous work when logging data and up to 16 hours of work as an LTE rover, even in cold weather. The Reach RS2+ can charge from a USB wall charger or a power bank over Type-C.OPUS and PPP support:Antenna calibration details for the Reach RS2+ are added to NOAA’s National Geodetic Survey registry. The post-processing will be flawless with OPUS, AUSPOS, and PPP services. SIM LoRa radio RS-232Water and dustproof:You can work in dusty areas or in the rain.Engineered to be tough:The Reach RS2+ is designed to work even in the most challenging environments.-20 °C to +65 °CWorks during the coldest winters and hottest summers. Polycarbonate body:Covered with elastomerReal-time navigation:The Reach RS2+ can send precise coordinates over Bluetooth or Wi-Fi to your tablet with a lightbar navigation app. The RS-232 interface allows the direct connection of the Reach RS2+ to an autosteer system. Solution formats: NMEA, LLH/XYZBase station mode:Use the Reach RS2+ to set up your own base station. Stream corrections over the network via NTRIP/TCP or LoRa radio, record base logs for post-processing. The Reach RS2+ works with any number of rovers, and it’s compatible with the Reach RS2 and Reach M2/M+.The Reach RS2+ is compatible with any receiver that supports RTCM3 and NTRIP. External radios are supported over RS-232

products.source_description: AG++ Flight Controller + NamoAG with AeroGCS Green ComboFeatures• Professional agri-drone control + navigation combo• Ag++ with obstacle avoidance & terrain-following• NamoAG with 1.5 m CEP GNSS accuracy• Multi-constellation satellite tracking• Powered by AeroGCS Software Stack Ag++ Flight Controller	High-Performance Control for Modern Farming The AeroFC Ag++ Flight Controller is designed for professional agricultural drone operations, delivering unmatched stability, precision, and control. Powered by a highspeed 32-bit main processor working in sync with a dedicated I/O processor, it ensures rapid and accurate responses for every mission.	Advanced Sensor Compatibility Supporting CAN-based front and rear obstacle avoidance radars and a CAN-based altimeter, Ag++ ensures precise terrain-following and safe navigation through complex environments. This makes it a reliable choice for operations over varied terrains and challenging field conditions.	Flexible Connectivity Options With 8 PWM motor outputs, 4 auxiliary PWM/GPIO outputs, 2 CAN buses, and 3 UART ports, the Ag++ offers versatile setup possibilities. Dedicated R/C inputs for PPM and S.Bus signals guarantee seamless integration with a variety of drone systems.	 NamoAG ( Navigation for modern Agriculture) An indigenously developed Agri-Drone Navigation device. Designed with the unique challenges of agriculture fields in mind, NamoAG delivers high-accuracy navigation, multi-constellation satellite support, and seamless pairing with Ag++ Flight Controller. From wide-open farms to complex terrains, fly with confidence.	Reliable Navigation in Every Field The NamoAG is an indigenously developed agri-drone navigation device that delivers 1.5 m CEP positioning accuracy. Optimized for agriculture, it provides multi-constellation satellite tracking for robust signal availability in open fields or obstructed environments.	Precision Hardware with Compact Design Built with a u-blox NEO-M9N receiver and powered by an ARM? Cortex? -M4 STM32F4 processor, NamoAG offers powerful processing in a compact 61.82 & 24.81 mm form factor, weighing only ~30g.	Feature-Rich for Agricultural Demands Equipped with a high-sensitivity compass, barometer, gyroscope, and accelerometer, it ensures accurate heading, altitude, and motion sensing. The DroneCAN protocol enables real-time, noise-resistant communication with flight controllers like the Ag++. Key Specifications	Satellite Support: GPS L1, GLONASS L1, SBAS L1, Galileo E1, BeiDou B1, QZSS L1	Positioning Accuracy: 1.5 m CEP	Input Voltage: 5V DC • Antenna: 35 mm	Integrated Safety Switch, Buzzer, and LEDs for status indication AeroGCS Software Stack	AeroGCS Green AeroGCS GREEN, India’s rest IV&V-certified precision spraying software, ensures uniform spraying, simplifies mission planning, and boosts efficiency with features like obstacle avoidance, spray flow monitoring, and detailed reporting. 1.
